title: Create items in another board from Emails & Activities
excerpt: Using Monday for project management and crm, we keep a log of each meeting we have with a client. Nearly every meeting has actions (items) they need raising. It would be good to start typing the actions in the meeting ca…

posts.author: Jlsmith3110 (Julia Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Using Monday for project management and crm, we keep a log of each meeting we have with a client. Nearly every meeting has actions (items) they need raising. It would be good to start typing the actions in the meeting category in emails & activities and have the option to create items in a new board ie the clients task list
